title: The Teaching of the True Persons
text:
## 19. The Noble Path

“Mendicants, I will teach you the teaching of the true persons and the teaching of the untrue persons. And what is the teaching of the untrue persons? Killing living creatures … wrong view. This is the teaching of the untrue persons.

And what is the teaching of the true persons? Not killing living creatures … right view. This is the teaching of the true persons.”
